name: Advanced Crystal Beast Topaz Tiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アドバンスド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> トパーズ・タイガー
desc: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. All "Advanced Crystal Beast" monsters you control gain 400 ATK/DEF, also monsters your opponent controls lose 400 ATK/DEF. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
mnst_eff: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. All "Advanced Crystal Beast" monsters you control gain 400 ATK/DEF, also monsters your opponent controls lose 400 ATK/DEF. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
